name: Fudgey Valentine Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/8 cup HERSHEY'S Cocoa OR European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------PINK BUTTERCREAM FROSTING-------------------------
3/8 cup Butter or margarine (softened)
4 1/4 cups Powdered sugar
4 tablespoons Milk
2 teaspoons Vanilla extract
1/4 teaspoon Red food color
Maraschino cherries, or Chocolate curls (optional)
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch heart-shaped pans.
2. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar on medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
3. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; add to butter mixture alternately with sour cream, blending well. Beat 3 minutes on medium speed.
4. Pour into prepared pans. Bake 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes; remove from pans to wire racks. Cool completely.
5. Prepare PINK BUTTERCREAM FROSTING. Frost top of one layer; place second layer on top. Frost top and sides of entire cake. Garnish with maraschino cherries or chocolate curls, if desired.
PINK BUTTERCREAM FROSTING: In a small bowl, beat butter until light and fluffy. Gradually add powdered sugar alternately with milk and vanilla until smooth and of desired consistency; stir in food color.
NOTE: One 8-inch square baking pan and one 8-inch round baking pan (each must be 2-inches deep) may be substituted for heart-shaped pans. Prepare, bake, and cool cake as directed above. Cut round layer in half, forming two half circles; place cut edge against adjacent sides of square layer to form a heart. Frost entire cake.
